mapper.sql: id, target_type, target_id, parent_id, reply_to_comment_id, reply_to_user_id, reply_to_nickname, author_user_id, author_nickname, author_email, author_site, author_ip, author_user_agent, content_md, content_html, audit_status, created_at, created_by, updated_at, updated_by, deleted, deleted_at, deleted_by
mapper.select: SELECT FROM t_comment WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT FROM t_comment WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0 FOR UPDATE

SELECT id, parent_id, reply_to_comment_id, reply_to_nickname, author_nickname, author_site, content_html, created_at FROM t_comment WHERE target_type = #{targetType} AND target_id = #{targetId} AND parent_id IS NULL AND audit_status = 1 AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_at ASC, id ASC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM t_comment WHERE target_type = #{targetType} AND target_id = #{targetId} AND parent_id IS NULL AND audit_status = 1 AND deleted = 0

SELECT id, target_type, target_id, parent_id, reply_to_comment_id, reply_to_nickname, author_nickname, author_email, author_site, author_ip, author_user_agent, content_md, content_html, audit_status, created_at, deleted FROM t_comment
ORDER BY created_at DESC, id DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT FROM t_comment WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 1 FOR UPDATE
mapper.update: UPDATE t_comment SET deleted = 1, deleted_at = #{deletedAt}, deleted_by = #{deletedBy}, updated_at = #{deletedAt}, updated_by = #{deletedBy} WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE t_comment SET deleted = 0, deleted_at = NULL, deleted_by = NULL, updated_at = #{updatedAt}, updated_by = #{updatedBy} WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 1
